subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamoured of the Light of Truth! Know thou that in this world every bounty is followed by decline, and every comfort is accompanied by weariness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نور حقیقتک مفتونی دنیاده هر بر نعمتک زوالی هر بر راحتک ملالی واردر انجق
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
